ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.title: Astral Event
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_EVENT.description: A special card originating from the Astral Party event system.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.title: Steps
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_STEPS.description: Steps gained from room entry for [Persona: Bionic Jasmine]. Unassigned, Rest Site, Shop, Treasure, Monster, and Map rooms grant [blue]2[/blue]. Event rooms grant [blue]3[/blue]. Elite rooms grant [blue]6[/blue]. Boss rooms grant [blue]10[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.title: Temporary
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_TEMPORARY.descript: Discard this card at the end of turn. This keyword is removed after the card enters the discard pile.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_ETERNAL_STARLIGHT_:
When you enter a shop, gain extra effects based on your Eternal Starlight stacks:
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]10[/blue], gain [blue]5[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]25[/blue], gain [blue]15[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]40[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold
· If Eternal Starlight is at least [blue]56[/blue], gain [blue]25[/blue] Gold and immediately obtain Membership Card
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DICE_SET.title: Set: Dice
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_DICE_SET.descripti:
When you own any [blue]2[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]1[/blue].
When you own any [blue]5[/blue] dice relics, reduce the trigger requirement to obtain another die relic by [blue]2[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COLLECTION.title: Collection
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COLLECTION.descrip: A special card pool mainly intended for commemorative value.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_UNIQUE.title: Unique
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_UNIQUE.description: Only [blue]1[/blue] Unique card with the same name can remain in your hand. If a same-name [gold]Unique[/gold] card is already there, the later card added to hand is automatically [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COOLDOWN.title: Cooldown
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_COOLDOWN.descripti: This card also has the effects of [gold]Unique[/gold], [gold]Retain[/gold], and [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.title: Solar Bombardment
ASTRALPARTYMOD-SOLAR_BOMBARDMENT.descrip: Discard all cards in your hand, then bombard random enemies. Base [blue]3[/blue] hits. For every [blue]2[/blue] discarded cards, bombard [blue]1[/blue] extra time. Base damage is [blue]3[/blue] and increases by [blue]1[/blue] for every [blue]3[/blue] total Energy cost among discarded cards. Discarded [blue]0[/blue]-cost cards count as [blue]1[/blue] Energy, and discarded X-cost cards count as your current Energy.
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_ORBITAL_BOMBARDMEN: When used as [gold]Orbital Bombardment Material[/gold], this card counts as [blue]2[/blue] cards and its cost counts as [blue]3[/blue].
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.title: Mixed
ASTRALPARTYMOD-ASTRAL_MIXED.description:
Attack: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Strength
Defensive Skill: +[blue]1[/blue] temporary Dexterity
Skill (no Block): Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP
Power: Gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy
Status: Draw [blue]1[/blue] card
Curse: Heal [blue]1[/blue] HP and gain [blue]1[/blue] Block
